_meta.purpose: This repo's own dev-session config for the GitHub Project sync tooling (scripts/github-project/). Distinct from the plugin's own hooks/hooks.json: those are shipped hook governance for products this plugin builds; this file is personal tooling for developing THIS repo against the SKILL GEN Project board. See INVESTIGATION.md for what was actually verified vs. inferred.

_hooks_note: The ExitPlanMode hook above only runs plan_exit.py WITHOUT --confirm — it prints the current draft, it never mutates GitHub. That keeps it safe to auto-fire: no approval-gated action happens without you explicitly running /plan-exit (with confirmation) afterward. There is no hookable 'entered plan mode' event distinct from the EnterPlanMode tool call itself, and that tool call carries no plan title/content to act on, so stage 1 (issue creation) has no native-hook path at all — /plan-start is the only mechanism, not a fallback for a broken automation. Whether this hook's stdout is actually surfaced to you mid-session (vs. only affecting hook exit-code/continue semantics) was not live-fire-verified while building this tooling — treat /plan-exit as the reliable path regardless.
